records.ety: [LL. itineratus, p. p. of itinerari, itinerare. See Itinerant.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Itinerated (*tn"r*ā`td); p. pr. & vb. n. Itinerating (*tn"r*ā`tng).]

defs: To wander without a settled habitation; to travel from place or on a circuit, particularly for the purpose of preaching, lecturing, etc.
